channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Sunday, April 12
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 02:16 PM (1.237 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 07:12 AM (-0.047 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: E 16 G 25 mph
